\doxysubsubsection*{Classes}
\begin{DoxyCompactItemize}
\item 
class \mbox{\hyperlink{classSingSub}{Sing\+Sub}}
\begin{DoxyCompactList}\small\item\em Analytic helpers for singularity subtraction on a single triangle. \end{DoxyCompactList}\end{DoxyCompactItemize}


\doxysubsection{Detailed Description}
Exact subtractions for singular/near-\/singular triangle integrals. 

The \doxylink{classSingSub}{Sing\+Sub} class provides {\itshape closed-\/form} line/surface integrals of powers of the distance R between an observation point r and points on a triangle. These are used to compute the analytic parts in singularity subtraction, and to form the vector/tensor K1–\+K4 terms. This implementation follows Hänninen, I., Taskinen, M., \& Sarvas, J. (2006) 

Definition in file \mbox{\hyperlink{SingSub_8h_source}{Sing\+Sub.\+h}}.
